name: BrahMos
description: Supersonic cruise missile, speed Mach 3, range 500km.

name: Tejas
description: Light combat aircraft developed by HAL for IAF.

name: Arjun MBT
description: Indigenously developed main battle tank with Kanchan armor.

name: Agni-V
description: Intercontinental ballistic missile with range over 5000km.

name: Pinaka
description: Multi-barrel rocket launcher, range up to 90km.

name: Dhruv ALH
description: Advanced light helicopter developed by HAL.

name: Aakash
description: Medium range SAM, can intercept aircraft and missiles.

name: INS Vikrant
description: India's first domestically built aircraft carrier, 45000 tonnes.

name: Prithvi II
description: Short range ballistic missile, range 350km, liquid fueled.

name: INS Arihant
description: India's first nuclear powered ballistic missile submarine.

name: Nag
description: Third generation fire and forget anti-tank guided missile.

name: Su-30MKI
description: Multirole air superiority fighter, backbone of IAF.

name: T-90 Bhishma
description: Russian T-90 license built in India, primary MBT of Indian Army.

name: Varunastra
description: Heavy weight torpedo, range 40km, developed by DRDO.

name: Rustom-2
description: Medium altitude long endurance UAV for ISR missions.

name: AK-203
description: Kalashnikov rifle manufactured in India, replacing INSAS.

name: Bofors FH-77
description: 155mm towed howitzer, range 30km, in service with Indian Army.

name: Akash Prime
description: Upgraded Akash with improved seeker for cold region operations.

name: P-8I Poseidon
description: Boeing maritime patrol aircraft operated by Indian Navy.

name: INSAS
description: Indian National Small Arms System, 5.56mm, standard infantry rifle.
